entries.name: Building
entries.summary: Constructed city infrastructure that remains on the board.

entries.name: Economy
entries.summary: Instant economic resolutions proposed by the Minister of State.

entries.name: Politics
entries.summary: Instant political resolutions proposed by the Minister of State.

entries.name: Capital Foundation
entries.summary: Starting city anchor for the empire map.

entries.name: Farm
entries.summary: Basic project that adds Food.

entries.name: Default Common Pool
entries.summary: Starter shared project pool.

entries.name: Default Empire Deck
entries.summary: Starter Empire deck for player hands.

entries.name: Default Event Deck
entries.summary: Starter Event deck.

entries.name: Diplomacy
entries.summary: Events decided by the Minister of State.

entries.name: Military
entries.summary: Events decided by the Minister of War.

entries.name: Provision
entries.summary: Events decided by the Minister of Health and Harvest.

entries.name: The Barbarian Horde
entries.summary: A military invasion tests the Empire's permanent defenses.

entries.name: The Crimson Plague
entries.summary: Disease punishes weak public health and low food reserves.

entries.name: Trade Embargo
entries.summary: Diplomatic isolation freezes commercial production.

entries.name: Minister of Health and Harvest
entries.summary: The provider. Controls provisioning and public health events.

entries.name: Minister of Infrastructure
entries.summary: The builder. Finalizes projects and decides which building is destroyed by infrastructure damage.

entries.name: Minister of State
entries.summary: The diplomat. Controls diplomacy events and may propose Politics or Economy cards.

entries.name: Minister of War
entries.summary: The defender. Controls military event edicts and reconnaissance.

entries.name: Minister of the Empire
entries.summary: The sovereign. Acts first, blocks one player during Council, and decides unassigned edicts.

entries.name: Diplomacy
entries.summary: Permanent diplomatic leverage and intelligence.

entries.name: Industry
entries.summary: Permanent workshops, quarries, and production base.

entries.name: Military
entries.summary: Permanent defensive and coercive capacity.

entries.name: Sanitary
entries.summary: Permanent public health and urban resilience.

entries.name: Unrest
entries.summary: Commitment and crisis tag used for sabotage thresholds.

entries.name: Food
entries.summary: Permanent agricultural and provisioning capacity.

entries.name: Labor
entries.summary: Temporary workforce and construction effort.

entries.name: Material
entries.summary: Temporary stone, timber, tools, and supply throughput.

entries.name: Wealth
entries.summary: Temporary coin, credit, and trade goods.
